API Reference

# Get Chains

This API returns all possible chains available.

GET

https://api.relay.linkhttps://api.testnets.relay.link

/

chains

Try it

cURL

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request GET \
  --url https://api.relay.link/chains
```
